title: Employment Center DA4176
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Employment Center DA4176''' was a structure on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. It exclusively hired [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] as construction workers to build the [[Emerald Splendor Estates]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] for [[Noble/Legends|aristocrat]] housing. In reality, the Employment Center was funneling aliens to Byss to work as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] while the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] [[Force drain/Legends|drained]] their [[Living Force/Legends|life force]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Evasive Action: Recruitment]]''
